title: Why stackable rewards in the 2026 Solo Contest change the game for retail traders
author: thienpro2
selftext:
Most trading competitions favor high-volume whales, but the BingX New Year 1st Fortune contest introduces a more balanced structure. By offering three separate leaderboards for Spot, Futures Volume, and Futures ROI, it allows different trading styles to compete simultaneously without being overshadowed by sheer capital size.



The most interesting part is that rewards are stackable. A versatile trader performing well across multiple categories could potentially secure a massive payout, capped at $568,000. Since the top 1000 participants receive rewards, the barrier to entry is significantly lower than traditional winner-takes-all events.
